headline: Why Sonos Shares Surged Friday After Hours

headline: Apple Ordered To Pay $300M In Royalties Over Wireless Technology Patent
summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has been ordered to pay $300 million over the use of the company’s wireless technology in iPhones and other products.

headline: There's Growing Buzz Around Dogecoin-Ethereum Collaboration: Here's What The Progress Looks Like
